# checkpointsase_enhanced_regions (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `regions` (List of Object) The list of available Check Point SASE regions for enhanced networks. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--regions))

<a id="nestedatt--regions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `regions`

Read-Only:

- `continent_code` (String)
- `country_code` (String)
- `display_name` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
